concerns.text: T019 (model_spec.yaml) appears AFTER T018 (hierarchical_model.py). The model code references the spec file, so T019 must precede T018. Producer-consumer violation.
T061 (compute SHA-256 checksums for data/raw/) requires data/raw/ to exist, but no task creates/populates this directory before Phase 2. Consumer-before-producer violation.
T063 (add docstrings to feature-engineering scripts) references network_features.py, user_susceptibility.py which are created in Phase 3, not Phase 2. Task references non-existent artifacts.
T066, T067 reference model_spec.yaml and feature-engineering scripts that don't exist until Phase 3. Foundational phase tasks cannot depend on US1 implementation artifacts.

Duplicate task IDs: T013 (load_cascade vs posterior_schema test), T028 (cv_metrics test vs k-fold CV), T060 (seed pinning appears twice), T061 (checksums appears twice). Creates unresolvable execution ambiguity.
T020 (HMC/NUTS sampling) marked [P] but depends on T018-T019 completion. Parallel tag is incorrect - this task has implicit ordering requirements.
T003 (linting config) marked [P] but depends on T002 (project initialization). Cannot configure linting before project is initialized.
T059, T060 duplicate T060 from Phase 2 (random-seed pinning). Redundant tasks indicate poor coordination; consolidate to single task in Phase 2.
T061 in Phase 6 duplicates T061 from Phase 2 (checksums). Consolidate to Phase 2 where data integrity is established.
